definitions.text: verbalform som uttrykker fortid i forhold til tidspunktet for utsagnet, for eksempel ‘det snødde i går’
definitions.translation: verb form expressing past tense relative to the time of utterance, 'it snowed yesterday'

definitions.text: brukt i vilkårssetninger, for eksempel ‘hvis jeg hadde mange penger’, ‘var det mulig å få litt å drikke?’
definitions.translation: used in conditional clauses, e.g. 'if I had a lot of money', 'was it possible to get something to drink?'

definitions.text: brukt i uttrykk for undring eller misnøye, for eksempel ‘det var stor gutt, det’, ‘det var dumt at du ikke kunne komme’
definitions.translation: used in expressions of wonder or dissatisfaction, e.g. 'that was a big boy, that was', 'it was a shame you couldn't come'
